Hacker News Confidence

Less annoying hacker news. (What is this?)

This site scrapes Hacker News once every 30 minutes, then sorts according to this formula, with upvotes as positive signals and comments as negative ones. In my experience, the best articles to read on HN are the ones with a high upvote-to-discussion ratio. Mostly because controversial pieces tend to produce a disproportionate number of comments compared to upvotes.


  1. Noq: n0's new QUIC implementation in Rust 49 upvotes, 6 comments
  2. Consensus Board Game 63 upvotes, 9 comments
  3. The Shape of Inequalities 73 upvotes, 12 comments
  4. Conway's Game of Life, in real life 297 upvotes, 82 comments
  5. NanoGPT Slowrun: 10x Data Efficiency with Infinite Compute 10 upvotes, 0 comments
  6. Return of the Obra Dinn: spherical mapped dithering for a 1bpp first-person game 50 upvotes, 10 comments
  7. Monuses and Heaps 15 upvotes, 1 comments
  8. OpenBSD: PF queues break the 4 Gbps barrier 146 upvotes, 44 comments
  9. Show HN: Three new Kitten TTS models – smallest less than 25MB 158 upvotes, 56 comments
  10. Hyper-optimized reverse geocoding API 46 upvotes, 12 comments
  11. Prompt Injecting Contributing.md 70 upvotes, 22 comments
  12. Ramtrack.eu – RAM Price Intelligence 65 upvotes, 20 comments
  13. Connecticut and the 1 Kilometer Effect 15 upvotes, 2 comments
  14. Eniac, the First General-Purpose Digital Computer, Turns 80 101 upvotes, 40 comments
  15. Show HN: I built a P2P network where AI agents publish formally verified science 10 upvotes, 1 comments
  16. Afroman found not liable in defamation case 959 upvotes, 540 comments
  17. macOS 26 breaks custom DNS settings including .internal 227 upvotes, 117 comments
  18. Juggalo Makeup Blocks Facial Recognition Technology (2019) 193 upvotes, 101 comments
  19. Scaling Karpathy's Autoresearch: What Happens When the Agent Gets a GPU Cluster 44 upvotes, 18 comments
  20. Astral to Join OpenAI 930 upvotes, 596 comments
  21. I turned Markdown into a protocol for generative UI 37 upvotes, 15 comments
  22. A rogue AI led to a serious security incident at Meta 33 upvotes, 13 comments
  23. What if Python was natively distributable? 45 upvotes, 20 comments
  24. World Happiness Report 2026 76 upvotes, 43 comments
  25. An update on Steam / GOG changes for OpenTTD 129 upvotes, 81 comments
  26. Launch HN: Voltair (YC W26) – Drone and charging network for power utilities 23 upvotes, 9 comments
  27. 4Chan mocks £520k fine for UK online safety breaches 93 upvotes, 71 comments
  28. How to Not Pay Your Taxes 84 upvotes, 68 comments
  29. Launch HN: Canary (YC W26) – AI QA that understands your code 18 upvotes, 11 comments
  30. Show HN: Dumped Wix for an AI Edge agent so I never have to hire junior staff 10 upvotes, 19 comments

Last generated 3:30am, 20 March 2026. Source here.
